name: explain_sql_statement
description: Describe the PostgreSQL query execution plan for a query of SQL statement by running EXPLAIN (ANAYLZE...) in the database

projectId.description: The ID of the project to execute the query against

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch to execute the query against. If not provided the default branch is used.

databaseName.description: The name of the database. If not provided, the default neondb or first available database is used.

analyze.description: Whether to include ANALYZE in the EXPLAIN command
